channel.title: Cognitive Semiotics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Cognitive Semiotics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Alexandra Mouratidou, Jordan Zlatev, Joost van de Weijer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cogsem-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: Distributed cognition in oral poetry improvisation: a semiosis-centered approach
item.description: Article by Alexandra Mouratidou, Jordan Zlatev, Joost van de Weijer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cogsem-2024-2011

item.title: Externalization of the mind in the meaning-making process: An integrated semiotic and cognitive science perspective
item.description: Article by Alexandra Mouratidou, Jordan Zlatev, Joost van de Weijer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cogsem-2024-2014

item.title: The virtual habits underlying the behavioural hallmarks of alloanimal episodic memory: a Peircean model
item.description: Article by Alexandra Mouratidou, Jordan Zlatev, Joost van de Weijer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cogsem-2024-2013

item.title: The body says it all: Non-verbal indicators of choice awareness
item.description: Article by Alexandra Mouratidou, Jordan Zlatev, Joost van de Weijer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cogsem-2024-2012
